title: Hannover, Lower Saxony — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Hannover, Lower Saxony: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Hannover is a city in Lower Saxony with a population of 536,000. The garden city of Lower Saxony, a major trade fair hub with sprawling green spaces, the iconic Herrenhausen Gardens, and a lively arts scene.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
